create_workspace.title: Create a new workspace
create_workspace.description: Workspaces are shared environments where teams can work on projects and issues.

delete_issue.title: Delete issue
delete_issue.description: This will permanently delete this issue and all its comments. This action cannot be undone.
delete_issue.hint: Any workspace member can delete issues.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.placeholder: Tell us about your experience, bugs you've found, or features you'd like to see…
feedback.toast_uploading: Please wait for uploads to finish…
feedback.github_hint_prefix: Want faster handling and open discussion? Head to

set_parent.title: Set parent issue
set_parent.description: Search for an issue to set as the parent of this issue

add_child.title: Add sub-issue
add_child.description: Search for an issue to add as a sub-issue

run_confirm.will_start_named: Once assigned, {{name}} will start working on this issue right away.
run_confirm.will_start_named_squad: Once assigned, {{name}}'s leader will review it and start assigning the work.
run_confirm.will_start: This will start work on {{count}} issues right away.
run_confirm.will_start_squad: This hands {{count}} issues to the squad's leader to review and assign.
run_confirm.nothing_assign: Assigned — won't start working while in Backlog.
run_confirm.note_placeholder: Tell them what matters — scope, focus, or what to avoid…
run_confirm.note_unsupported: Their runtime is too old to receive this handoff note; it may not be read.
run_confirm.create_will_start: {{name}} will start working right after creation.
run_confirm.create_will_start_squad: {{name}}'s leader will review it and start assigning work right after creation.
run_confirm.create_parked: Assigned — won't start working in Backlog.

create_squad.title: Create Squad
create_squad.description: Create a collaborative squad with a leader agent and optional additional members.
create_squad.description_placeholder: Describe what this squad is responsible for...
create_squad.leader_hint: The leader receives all tasks assigned to this squad and coordinates the team.
create_squad.members_hint: Members the leader can delegate sub-tasks to. Can be added later.
create_squad.no_agents: No active agents available. Create an agent first.

create_project.title: New Project
create_project.description_hint: Shared with agents as context for every task in this project.
create_project.repos_heading: Attach GitHub repos to this project
create_project.repos_empty: No workspace-level repos yet. Paste a URL below to attach one ad-hoc.
create_project.local_heading: Use a local working directory on this machine
create_project.local_daemon_offline: Daemon offline — start it to bind a local directory.
create_project.local_pick_failed: Could not open the directory picker.
create_project.local_invalid_dir: This directory can't be used. Pick another.
create_project.local_hint: Agents on other machines won't see this path — they'll fail to start. Use repos for shared work.

create_issue.switch_to_agent_tooltip: Switch to create with agent — describe in one line and let the agent file it
create_issue.switch_to_manual_tooltip: Switch to manual create — fill the fields yourself

set_parent_picker.title: Set parent issue
set_parent_picker.description: Search for an issue to set as the parent of the new issue

add_subissue_picker.title: Add sub-issue
add_subissue_picker.description: Search for an issue to add as a sub-issue of the new issue

agent.version_missing: This agent's daemon doesn't report a CLI version. Create with agent needs multica CLI ≥ {{min}}. Upgrade the daemon and reconnect, or switch to manual create.
agent.version_below: This agent's daemon CLI is {{current}} — Create with agent needs ≥ {{min}}. Upgrade the daemon, or switch to manual create.
agent.prompt_placeholder: Tell the agent what to do, e.g. "let Bohan fix the inbox loading slowness in the Web project"
agent.toast_sent: Sent to agent — you'll get an inbox notification when it's done
agent.error_agent_unavailable_fallback: Agent is unavailable. Pick another agent.
agent.error_daemon_version: This agent's daemon CLI ({{current}}) is below the required {{min}}. Upgrade the daemon to use Create with agent.
